items.html: Rather, the matter is thus: these lights that must come out to build her first all rise within the Guf [body] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], from the Yesod in him up to the place of the Chazeh [chest]. There, the Atara [crown] of Gevura, called Botzina de Kardinuta [the hardened candle], which is the portion of the lights of Malchut, makes an orifice and pierces and comes outside through that orifice to the back of the Chazeh. Then all the lights the Nukva [female] needs come out through there, in the secret of an ascent from below upward, as mentioned. Afterwards they return and descend and enter the Guf of the Nukva by way of descent from above downward, little by little — in the way the Mochin [minds] of ZA enter within him little by little, and they are in the discernment of a Tzelem [image], as is known. So too the Nukva: her lights are made into one Tzelem and enter within her until the completion of twelve years and one day, and some of them remain in the secret of surrounding Light, in the discernments of the Lamed-Mem of Tzelem, upon their heads, exactly after the likeness of ZA. And the duration of the ascent of these lights, their going outside, and their descent into her, is twelve years and one day.
